originalTitle: M-tron Industries, Inc. (MPTI) Stock Sinks As Market Gains: Here's Why
summary: The latest trading day saw M-tron Industries, Inc. (MPTI) settling at $87.83, representing a -1.82% change from its previous close.
content:
In the latest trading session, M-tron Industries, Inc. (MPTI) closed at $87.83, marking a -1.82% move from the previous day. The stock fell short of the S&P 500, which registered a gain of 0.42% for the day. Meanwhile, the Dow experienced a rise of 0.29%, and the technology-dominated Nasdaq saw an increase of 0.29%.

The company's shares have seen a decrease of 7.15% over the last month, not keeping up with the Construction sector's loss of 1.68% and the S&P 500's gain of 2.2%.

Market participants will be closely following the financial results of M-tron Industries, Inc. in its upcoming release. The company is forecasted to report an EPS of $0.47, showcasing a 11.32% downward movement from the corresponding quarter of the prior year. Meanwhile, the latest consensus estimate predicts the revenue to be $14.8 million, indicating a 11.45% increase compared to the same quarter of the previous year.

MPTI's full-year Zacks Consensus Estimates are calling for earnings of $2.26 per share and revenue of $59.7 million. These results would represent year-over-year changes of -13.74% and +9.71%, respectively.

Investors should also take note of any recent adjustments to analyst estimates for M-tron Industries, Inc. These latest adjustments often mirror the shifting dynamics of short-term business patterns. As such, positive estimate revisions reflect analyst optimism about the business and profitability.

Our research reveals that these estimate alterations are directly linked with the stock price performance in the near future. To exploit this, we've formed the Zacks Rank, a quantitative model that includes these estimate changes and presents a viable rating system.

The Zacks Rank system, stretching from #1 (Strong Buy) to #5 (Strong Sell), has a noteworthy track record of outperforming, validated by third-party audits, with stocks rated #1 producing an average annual return of +25% since the year 1988. Over the last 30 days, the Zacks Consensus EPS estimate has remained unchanged. At present, M-tron Industries, Inc. boasts a Zacks Rank of #2 (Buy).

In the context of valuation, M-tron Industries, Inc. is at present trading with a Forward P/E ratio of 39.58. This expresses a premium compared to the average Forward P/E of 24.64 of its industry.

It's also important to note that MPTI currently trades at a PEG ratio of 1.58. This popular metric is similar to the widely-known P/E ratio, with the difference being that the PEG ratio also takes into account the company's expected earnings growth rate. The Engineering - R and D Services industry currently had an average PEG ratio of 1.59 as of yesterday's close.

The Engineering - R and D Services industry is part of the Construction sector. At present, this industry carries a Zacks Industry Rank of 68, placing it within the top 28% of over 250 industries.

The Zacks Industry Rank gauges the strength of our industry groups by measuring the average Zacks Rank of the individual stocks within the groups. Our research shows that the top 50% rated industries outperform the bottom half by a factor of 2 to 1.

Ensure to harness Zacks.com to stay updated with all these stock-shifting metrics, among others, in the next trading sessions.

chineseTitle: M-tron Industries, Inc. (MPTI) 股票随着市场上涨而下跌：原因如下
chineseSummary: 最近一个交易日，M-tron Industries, Inc. (MPTI) 收于 87.83 美元，较前收盘价上涨 -1.82%。
chineseContent:
在最新的交易日中，M-tron Industries, Inc. (MPTI) 收于 87.83 美元，较前一交易日上涨 -1.82%。该股的表现低于标准普尔 500 指数，后者当天涨幅为 0.42%。与此同时，道琼斯指数上涨0.29%，以科技股为主的纳斯达克指数上涨0.29%。

该公司股价上个月下跌 7.15%，未能跟上建筑业 1.68% 的跌幅和标准普尔 500 指数 2.2% 的涨幅。

市场参与者将密切关注 M-tron Industries, Inc. 即将发布的财务业绩。该公司预计每股收益为 0.47 美元，较去年同期下降 11.32%。与此同时，最新的共识预测收入为 1,480 万美元，较去年同期增长 11.45%。

MPTI 的全年 Zacks 共识预计每股收益为 2.26 美元，收入为 5970 万美元。这些结果将分别代表-13.74% 和+9.71% 的同比变化。

投资者还应注意最近对 M-tron Industries, Inc. 分析师预测的任何调整。这些最新调整通常反映了短期业务模式的动态变化。因此，积极的估计修正反映了分析师对业务和盈利能力的乐观态度。

我们的研究表明，这些估计的变化与近期的股价表现直接相关。为了利用这一点，我们形成了 Zacks Rank，这是一个定量模型，其中包括这些估计变化并提供了一个可行的评级系统。

Zacks Rank 系统从#1（强力买入）延伸到#5（强力卖出），拥有出色的表现记录，经第三方审计验证，自 1988 年以来，排名#1 的股票产生的平均年回报率为 +25%。在过去 30 天内，Zacks 共识 EPS 估计保持不变。目前，M-tron Industries , Inc . 拥有 Zacks 排名第二（购买）。

在估值方面，M-tron Industries, Inc. 目前的远期市盈率为 39.58。与行业平均远期市盈率 24.64 相比，这存在溢价。

还需要注意的是，MPTI 目前的 PEG 比率为 1.58。这一流行的指标与广为人知的市盈率类似，不同之处在于，PEG比率还考虑了公司的预期盈利增长率。截至昨天收盘，工程研发服务行业目前的平均 PEG 率为 1.59。

工程-研发服务行业是建筑行业的一部分。目前，该行业的 Zacks 行业排名为 68，在 250 多个行业中排名前 28%。

Zacks 行业排名通过衡量行业组内个股的平均 Zacks 排名来衡量我们行业组的实力。我们的研究表明，排名前 50% 的行业的表现比排名后一半的行业高出 2 比 1。

确保利用 Zacks.com 在接下来的交易时段中及时了解所有这些库存转移指标等。
